article_meta.title: US News exclusive ICE agent who opened fire on Renee Good was dragged, hospitalized by illegal migrant driver last year

reasoning: The response repeatedly flags quoted/attributed language as author bias, misses several clear instances in the author’s own prose, and uses non-standard or incorrect bias type labels. Some valid bias was identified, but errors are substantial.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Flagged quoted/attributed phrases, e.g., Noem’s “mob of agitators,” and included Walz’s quoted “modern-day Gestapo” within the flagged text.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Several items aren’t genuine author-level bias (e.g., treating attributed official statements as bias; “Authority Bias” and “Imbalanced Reporting” claims are overreaches).
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed clear author-prose bias like “poured gasoline on the long-smoldering tension,” “whopping 8,000% surge,” and a clean flag of “embattled” and “serial illegal immigrant.”
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Used non-listed labels (Loaded Language, Framing Bias, Authority Bias, Imbalanced Reporting) and misapplied types; only “Sensationalism” was close to the allowed Sensationalism/Emotionalism.
